summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on CNBC discussing the Iran oil blockade, Kharg Island loadings, and the regime being 'on its last legs.' Split-screen news format with Beijing summit B-roll and tickers. TV news clip, not a produced piece.
notable_text: TRUMP-XI SUMMIT IN BEIJING; SEC. BESSENT: IN CHINA'S INTEREST TO GET STRAIT OF HORMUZ OPEN (CNBC)
